phases.name: Baseline 4-Waypoint Route
phases.criteria: Capture all 4 route waypoints within 400 seconds with altitude held stable within ±500 ft.

conditions.name: Waypoint Capture
conditions.description: Successfully captured all flight plan waypoints

conditions.name: Flight Stability
conditions.description: No NaNs or state divergence occurred during flight

conditions.name: Altitude Hold
conditions.description: Altitude remained within ±500 ft of target
